description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push and pull request to the default branch. Use two jobs, build and build-alpine, each running on ubuntu-18.04. The build job uses a matrix strategy to test with Node.js versions 14.x, 16.x, 17.x, and 18.x, while the build-alpine job uses a similar matrix but runs in an Alpine container with the corresponding Node.js version. For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies, run npm ci, and execute npm test.
